checklist_items.title: Verify web server configuration file permissions
checklist_items.description: Check that critical web server configuration files and directories have appropriate read-only permissions for standard users and are only writable by authorized administrators.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Ensure correct file permissions on configuration files
checklist_items.evidence_required: Screenshot of file permissions, output of permission check script, audit report.

checklist_items.title: Verify configuration change logging and alerting
checklist_items.description: Check that all modifications to web server configuration files or settings are logged, and that alerts are generated for unexpected or unauthorized changes.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement configuration change logging and alerting
checklist_items.evidence_required: Log configuration settings, example log entries, alerting rule configuration screenshot.

checklist_items.title: Verify configuration file integrity checking
checklist_items.description: Check if a mechanism (e.g., file integrity monitoring, configuration management tool checksums, immutable infrastructure) is in place to detect unauthorized modifications to web server configuration files.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: There is no integrity checking on configuration files.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use configuration management tools with integrity checks or immutable infrastructure
checklist_items.evidence_required: Configuration of FIM/CM tool, test result showing detected change, architecture diagram if using immutable infra.
